Experiences
Our Story

What Is F95?

F95 is a unique lifestyle destination in Kottakuppam near Pondicherry. We combine multiple premium experiences in one incredible place — professional car washing, stunning celebration setups, private mini theater screenings, and a relaxing cafe.

Whether you're planning a birthday surprise, watching a movie with friends, or simply washing your car — F95 delivers a premium experience like no other.

Car Wash
Celebration Events
Mini Theater
Premium Cafe
